L1.name: Harness 白盒化基础
L1.description: TraceEvent 定义 + collect_events 全量捕获 + EvalTrace 升级 + UTF-8 fix

L2.name: 失败自动归因
L2.description: FailureClass 枚举 + FailureClassifier + EvalScore 集成 + 报告失败摘要

L3.name: 多维评分
L3.description: EvalScore.dimensions + ToolCallScorer 多维化 + BehaviorScorer 多维化

L4.name: 新 Scorer + 平台评估数据集
L4.description: PlatformBehaviorScorer + EventSequenceScorer + security/provider 数据集 + Suite 注册

L5.name: 数据集清理 + 文档更新
L5.description: 现有数据集清理/降级 + 设计文档最终化 + 基线报告更新

phase_name: Phase L — 评估系统白盒化 + 企业级数据集
notes: Phase K near-complete (11/12). Phase L design doc and plan committed. Ready for execution. Design: EVAL_WHITEBOX_DESIGN.md. Core theme: black-box to white-box eval + enterprise capability focus.
